name: Amazon
exceptions: Electronics: 30 days. Amazon Devices: 30 days. Amazon Fresh/Whole Foods: 7 days. Third-party marketplace sellers vary.
warrantyPolicy: Varies by product and seller. Amazon-fulfilled items eligible for A-to-Z Guarantee.

name: Target
exceptions: Electronics and entertainment: 30 days. Apple products: 15 days. Target Circle Card holders get extra 30 days.
warrantyPolicy: Manufacturer warranty applies. Target Protection Plans available for purchase.

name: Walmart
exceptions: Electronics: 30 days. Computers/tablets: 15 days. Phones: 14 days. Firearms: non-returnable.
warrantyPolicy: Manufacturer warranty applies. Walmart Protection Plans available.

name: Costco
exceptions: Electronics (TVs, computers, cameras, tablets, phones): 90 days. Cigarettes/alcohol: non-returnable. Diamonds >1 carat: requires inspection.
warrantyPolicy: Costco Concierge Services provides 2-year warranty extension on electronics beyond manufacturer warranty.

name: Best Buy
exceptions: My Best Buy Elite: 30 days. My Best Buy Elite Plus: 45 days. Cell phones/devices: 15 days. Non-members: 15 days.
warrantyPolicy: Geek Squad Protection Plans available. Manufacturer warranty applies.

name: Apple
exceptions: iPhone: 14 days. All products 14 days. Custom-configured Macs: 14 days. Apps/media: non-returnable.
warrantyPolicy: 1-year limited warranty standard. AppleCare+ extends to 2-3 years with accidental damage coverage.

name: The Home Depot
exceptions: Major appliances: 30 days. Generators/furniture/area rugs: 30 days. Perennials/trees/shrubs: 1 year.
warrantyPolicy: Manufacturer warranty applies. Home Depot Protection Plans available for major appliances.

name: Lowe's
exceptions: Major appliances: 30 days. Outdoor power equipment: 30 days. Paint: non-returnable if tinted.
warrantyPolicy: Manufacturer warranty applies. Lowe's Protection Plans available.

name: Macy's
exceptions: Furniture/mattresses: 3 days. Fine jewelry/watches: 30 days with original packaging. Last Act clearance: non-returnable.
warrantyPolicy: Manufacturer warranty applies. Macy's does not offer extended warranties.

name: Nordstrom
exceptions: No time limit for most items. Nordstrom Rack: 45 days. Worn/washed items assessed case by case.
warrantyPolicy: Manufacturer warranty applies.

name: Kohl's
exceptions: Premium electronics/watches: 30 days. Without receipt: store credit at lowest selling price.
warrantyPolicy: Manufacturer warranty applies.

name: TJ Maxx
exceptions: In-store: 30 days. Online: 40 days from ship date. Swimwear/intimate apparel: tags must be attached.
warrantyPolicy: Manufacturer warranty applies.

name: Gap
exceptions: Final sale items: non-returnable. Online orders: 45 days from ship date.
warrantyPolicy: Gap does not offer product warranties.

name: Zara
exceptions: Items must be unworn with tags attached. Sale items: same 30-day window.
warrantyPolicy: Zara does not offer product warranties.

name: Old Navy
exceptions: Final sale items: non-returnable. Online: 45 days from ship date.
warrantyPolicy: Old Navy does not offer product warranties.

name: Sam's Club
exceptions: Electronics/computers/televisions: 90 days. Cell phones: 14 days. Commercial machinery: 30 days.
warrantyPolicy: Manufacturer warranty applies. Sam's Club Protection Plans available.

name: CVS
exceptions: Prescription medications: non-returnable. Opened personal care items: non-returnable.
warrantyPolicy: Manufacturer warranty applies on applicable products.

name: Walgreens
exceptions: Prescription items: non-returnable. Opened health/beauty: non-returnable.
warrantyPolicy: Manufacturer warranty applies on applicable products.

name: IKEA
exceptions: Opened mattresses: non-returnable. Custom-cut fabric: non-returnable. Plants/food: non-returnable. As-Is items: 180 days.
warrantyPolicy: IKEA offers 10-year warranty on most furniture. Specific products vary (2-25 years).

name: Overstock (fmr. Bed Bath & Beyond)
exceptions: Furniture/mattresses: 30 days. Marketplace items vary by seller.
warrantyPolicy: Manufacturer warranty applies.
